title: Cannot return reference to local variable
explanation: This error occurs when you try to return a reference to a value that is created inside a function. When the function returns, the local variable is dropped, so the reference would point to invalid memory.
error_message: error[E0515]: cannot return reference to local variable `s`
tip: If you need to return a reference, the referenced data must outlive the function — it must come from a parameter or be 'static.
